EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not start a virtual machine on host {event_src.host} Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} restarted a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} stopped a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not stop a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} could not restart a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
